title: Record soft20 handoff22 and reserved4k densify

fixtureActions.content:
# Soft20 Handoff22 Reserved4k Contract

## Soft 20
soft compaction trigger defaults to 0.20 with quality bias floor 0.18 so reclaim can tighten after emergency backstops

## Handoff 22
swarm handoff compaction ratio defaults to 0.22 so pre-swarm reclaim runs earlier

## Reserved 4k
reserved context for hard blocking defaults to 4k for denser long-horizon reclaim

## Evidence path
LioraBench holdout + strategy/status/usage vitest
